---
title: "Plots for Transcription Factor Activity Estimation with CelEsT"
author: "Sharan Surya"
format: 
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    number-sections: true
    code-fold: show
    code-line-numbers: true
    highlight-style: github  
    theme: cosmo
---


# Overview

Plots for Transcription factor (TF) activity estimation using the CelEsT gene regulatory network. 



```{r}
#| label: document-chunk-options
#| include: false

rm(list = ls())

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  fig.align = "center",
  dpi = 300
)

options(scipen = 10000)

```

# Load Required Packages

```{r}
#| label: setup-libraries
#| message: false
#| warning: false

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggrepel)
library(scales)
library(readxl)
```

# Read Data from Analysis file

```{r read-analysis-list}
all_tf_activity <- readRDS("celest/output/all_tf_activity.rds")
```


# Visualization

Generate publication-quality volcano plots for each tissue showing TF activity scores and significance.

```{r volcano-plots, fig.width=10, fig.height=8, results='asis'}
# Loop through each tissue and create volcano plot
cairo_pdf("celest/plots/TF_activity_volcano_all_tissues.pdf", width = 10, height = 8, onefile = TRUE)


for (tissue in names(all_tf_activity)) {
  
  cat("\n\n## ", tissue, "\n\n", sep = "")
  
  # Get tissue-specific data
  tf_activity <- all_tf_activity[[tissue]]
  
  # Prepare data for visualization
  plot_data <- data.frame(
    tf_activity,
    neglog10_p = -log10(tf_activity$p_value),
    significant = tf_activity$p_value < 0.05
  )
  
  # Add labels only for significant TFs
  plot_data$label <- ifelse(plot_data$significant, plot_data$public_name, NA)
  
  # Define color scheme
  colors <- c("grey50", "#E63946")
  
  # Create volcano plot
  volcano_plot <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = score, y = neglog10_p)) +
    # Add points
    geom_point(
      aes(color = significant),
      size = 2.5,
      alpha = 0.6,
      show.legend = FALSE
    ) +
    # Significance threshold
    geom_hline(
      yintercept = -log10(0.05),
      linetype = "dashed",
      color = "black",
      linewidth = 0.5
    ) +
    # Zero reference line
    geom_vline(
      xintercept = 0,
      linetype = "dotted",
      color = "grey30",
      linewidth = 0.4
    ) +
    # Label significant TFs
    geom_text_repel(
      aes(label = label),
      size = 3.5,
      fontface = "italic",
      box.padding = 0.5,
      max.overlaps = 25,
      min.segment.length = 0,
      segment.size = 0.25,
      segment.color = "grey30",
      seed = 42
    ) +
    # Color scale
    scale_color_manual(
      values = colors,
      name = NULL
    ) +
    # Axes
    scale_x_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = 0.1)) +
    scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0.02, 0.1))) +
    # Labels with tissue name
    labs(
      x = "TF Activity Score",
      y = expression(-log[10]~"(p-value)"),
      title = paste("Transcription Factor Activity -", tissue)
    ) +
    # Theme
    theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
    theme(
      # Text
      plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
      axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
      axis.text = element_text(size = 10, color = "black"),
      
      # Legend
      legend.position = c(0.02, 0.98),
      legend.justification = c(0, 1),
      legend.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = "grey80", linewidth = 0.5),
      legend.text = element_text(size = 10),
      legend.key.size = unit(0.4, "cm"),
      legend.margin = margin(5, 5, 5, 5),
      
      # Panel
      panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "grey90", linewidth = 0.3),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 0.8),
      
      # Background
      plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
      panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA)
    )
  
  # Display plot
  print(volcano_plot)    
  
  cat("\n**Significant TFs:**", sum(plot_data$significant), "\n\n")
  
  # Show top 10 TFs for this tissue
  top_tfs <- tf_activity[1:min(10, nrow(tf_activity)), 
                         c("public_name", "score", "p_value", "Wormbase_mode_of_regulation")]
  
}

dev.off()
```


# Session Info

```{r}
sessionInfo()
```
